owner_authorization: User explicitly authorized external LLM advisory use on 2026-06-29; output is advisory only and cannot mutate repo state directly.
instruction: Classify exact event_kind groups into candidate bounded event_family values only when high-confidence. Prefer conservative no_rule for broad/mixed groups. Do not invent facts. Return JSON only.

MTA LIRR Far Rockaway Line train struck a bumper block in Atlantic Terminal-Brooklyn Station. 122 claims put into suit. $11 million FMTAC Station Maintenance retention limit paid. $19.57 million impacted. 6 open lawsuits.

MTA LIRR track equipment derailed fouling live track and was struck by a train carrying passengers near New Hyde Park Station. 72 claims related to this accident: 57 passenger injuries, 8 employee injuries, property damage. $11 million FMTAC Force Account retention limit paid. $8.6 million impacted ELF program.
